resources.string: MacroKey needs accessibility permission to inject ready-made text into message fields in other apps (like WhatsApp and Email). The service does not collect information and does not send any data — everything stays on your device.
Stop typing the same sentences over and over.\nMacroKey lets you paste complete text blocks with a single tap.
Open the app, tap +, give it a name and color.\nType your text once — it\'s saved forever.

MacroKey needs two permissions to work:

• Accessibility Service — to inject text into message fields
• Display over apps — for the floating button

MacroKey does NOT collect any data.
Everything stays on your device.
Open any app, tap the floating M button, and choose a block.\nYour text will be pasted instantly.
No blocks yet.\nTap + to create your first block!
✓ All set! The floating button is active.
Please fill in name and content

We all type the same texts over and over — bank details, addresses, client replies, form answers. MacroKey saves them once and lets you paste them anywhere with a single tap. No more digging through notes or retyping from memory.
Think of a text you send often — your bank details, a reply to clients, your address. Open MacroKey, tap +, give it a name and color, and type that text once. From now on, it\'s always one tap away.
The small orange M button floats over every app — WhatsApp, Email, SMS, Chrome, any text field. When someone asks for your details, just tap it. No need to switch apps or search through notes.
Your color-coded blocks appear. Tap one — the full text pastes instantly into the message field. What used to take a minute now takes a second.
Found a useful text in another app? Select it, tap Share, and choose \"Save to MacroKey\". It becomes a block you can paste again and again — no retyping needed.
Details changed? Tap any block to update it. Need to remove one? Tap the red trash icon. Your blocks stay organized and up to date.

• Drag the M button anywhere on screen — put it where it\'s most convenient for you.\n• Long-press a block to preview its content before pasting.\n• The floating button appears automatically whenever Accessibility Service is enabled — no need to open the app each time.
That\'s it. Save once, paste forever. MacroKey turns your most-used texts into one-tap shortcuts — so you can spend your time on what actually matters.

MacroKey Privacy Policy

Last updated: March 2026

1. Data Collection
MacroKey does NOT collect, store, or transmit any personal data. All text blocks you create are stored locally on your device only.

2. Accessibility Service
MacroKey uses Android's Accessibility Service solely to inject your pre-saved text into message fields in other apps. The service does NOT read, record, or transmit any content from other apps.

3. Internet Access
MacroKey does NOT require internet access. The app works entirely offline.

4. Third-Party Services
MacroKey does NOT use any third-party analytics, advertising, or tracking services.

5. Data Storage
All data is stored locally on your device using a local database. Uninstalling the app permanently deletes all your data.

6. Children's Privacy
MacroKey does not knowingly collect information from children under 13.

Contact
For questions about this privacy policy, contact us through our Google Play listing.
Upgrade to MacroKey Pro and keep all your blocks working — forever.
Purchase could not be completed. Try again.

MacroKey uses Android's Accessibility Service solely to paste your pre-saved text blocks into message fields in other apps (such as WhatsApp, Email, and SMS).

What the service does:
• Detects the currently focused text field
• Pastes your selected text block into it

What the service does NOT do:
• Does NOT read, record, or collect any content from other apps
• Does NOT monitor your keystrokes or screen
• Does NOT transmit any data — everything stays on your device

You can disable this permission at any time in Settings → Accessibility.
